category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an easy way to use Git; official GitHub README describes ungit as a user-friendly web UI for Git.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ungit; official GitHub README heading uses ungit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installing, using, and configuring ungit; repository has an official GitHub wiki for supplemental documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/FredrikNoren/ungit, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe ungit as a Git user interface that runs via Node.js and a browser.
